summary.intent: Review and resolve unresolved comment threads on PR #479 in the moltis repository, fixing any issues raised by reviewers.
summary.outcome: Replaced a `curl | bash` setup script with explicit GPG key import and apt source entry in the Dockerfile, mirroring the existing Docker CLI install pattern, then committed and pushed the fix.

repo: The moltis repo uses worktrees under /Users/penso/.superset/worktrees/moltis/
Dockerfile follows an explicit GPG key import + apt source entry pattern for installing external tools (e.g., Docker CLI) rather than piping curl to bash

code.finding: Setup scripts should use explicit GPG key import + apt source entry instead of curl | bash for security and consistency with the Docker CLI install pattern already in the file

workflow: PR review threads are fetched via GitHub API/gh CLI to identify unresolved conversations before addressing them
